behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file, method name, exact signature, placement, and call syntax, which covers all test assertions.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction provides the exact method signature, exact call syntax `$this->beforeCreateGitDeployment($project, $repository, $dbForPlatform, $authorization)`, empty body requirement, and placement — essentially the full solution.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for the documented signature/call pattern which matches the instruction's explicit requirements; alternative correct fixes following the spec would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests primarily do regex/string matching on file content (test_method_exists_with_correct_signature, test_method_is_called_in_createGitDeployments, test_method_has_noop_implementation, test_method_is_protected); only PHP lint and composer checks execute code, none invoke the hook.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests verify specific signature, placement between PROJECT_NOT_FOUND and DSN, and empty body — a stub can't trivially pass without adding the method.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All stated requirements (signature, visibility, placement, no-op body, call syntax) are covered by tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Each test has a descriptive name and docstring explaining its purpose.

no_typos.reason: Filenames, method names, and parameters are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction specifies exact placement ('after the PROJECT_NOT_FOUND exception check, before the DSN creation line') and exact call syntax, removing localization/design effort.
